classes.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.boxplot.Boxplot
documentation:
<<< Boxplot >>>

A box-plot is a statistical chart used to show a set of data dispersion data.
It displays the maximum, minimum, median, lower quartile, and upper quartile
of a set of data.

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.themeriver.ThemeRiver
documentation:
<<< ThemeRiver >>>

ThemeRiver graph is a special kind of flow graph,
which is mainly used to show the changes of events or themes
over a period of time.

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.three_axis_charts.map3D.Map3D
documentation: 3D map

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.scatter.Scatter
documentation:
<<< Scatter >>>

The scatter diagram on the rectangular coordinate system can be used to
show the relationship between x and y of the data. If the data item has
multiple dimensions, it can be represented by color, and the
visualmap component can be used.

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.map.MapMixin
documentation:
<<< Map >>>

Map are mainly used for visualization of geographic area data.

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.pictorialbar.PictorialBar
documentation:
<<< PictorialBar Chart >>>

PictorialBar is a histogram that can set various figurative graphic
elements (such as images, SVG PathData, etc.)

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.effectscatter.EffectScatter
documentation:
<<< Scatter plots with ripple effects animation >>>

Use animation effects to visually highlight designated data set.

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.calendar.Calendar
documentation:
<<< Calendar Diagram >>>

The calendar diagram is mainly used to represent the size of a value by
color and must be used in conjunction with the visualMap component.
Two categories of axes must be used in rectangular coordinates.

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.pie.Pie
documentation:
<<< Pie >>>

The pie chart is mainly used to represent the proportion of data of
different categories in the total. Each radian represents the ratio of
the number of data points.

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.treemap.TreeMap
documentation:
<<< TreeMap >>>

TreeMap are a common visual representation of "hierarchical data" and "tree data".
It mainly uses area to highlight the important nodes in the hierarchy of "tree".

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.radar.Radar
documentation:
<<< Radar >>>

Radar maps are mainly used to represent multivariable data.

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.heatmap.HeatMap
documentation:
<<< HeatMap >>>

The heat map is mainly used to represent the size of the value by color,
which must be used in conjunction with the visualMap component.
Two categories of axes must be used in rectangular coordinates.

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.funnel.Funnel
documentation:
<<< Funnel >>>

Funnel diagram is suitable for one-way analysis of single process
with standardized business process, long cycle and multiple links.
Through comparison of business data of each link in the funnel,
the link where the potential problems can be found intuitively,
and then decisions can be made.

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.tree.Tree

methods.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.tree.Tree._set_collapse_interval
documentation:
间隔折叠节点，当节点过多时可以解决节点显示过杂间隔。

```
param data

节点数据

param interval

指定间隔
```

<<< Tree diagrams >>>

Tree diagrams are used primarily to visualize tree data structures,
which are special hierarchical types with unique root nodes, left subtrees,
and right subtrees.

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.amap.AMap
documentation:
<<< AMap(GaoDe) coordinate system >>>

Support scatter plot, line.

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.kline.Kline
documentation:
<<< K-line >>>

K-line shows the highest value, the lowest value,
the starting value and the ending value of the data on the day,
which is used to show the daily fluctuation of the data or
the fluctuation of a certain period.

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.bar.Bar
documentation:
<<< Bar Chart >>>

Bar chart presents categorical data with rectangular bars
with heights or lengths proportional to the values that they represent.

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.bmap.BMap
documentation:
<<< Baidu coordinate system >>>

Support scatter plot, line

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.gauge.Gauge
documentation:
<<< Gauge >>>

The gauge displays a single key business measure.

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.liquid.Liquid
documentation:
<<< Liquid >>>

The liquid chart is mainly used to highlight the percentage of data.

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.sunburst.Sunburst
documentation:
<<< Sunburst >>

Sunburst graphs are composed of multiple layers of ring graphs.
In terms of data structure, inner circle is the parent node of outer circle.
Therefore, it can represent local and global proportions like pie charts and
hierarchical relationships like rectangle tree graphs.

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.geo.Geo
documentation:
<<< geo coordinate system >>>

support scatter plot and line

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.custom.Custom
documentation:
<<< Custom >>>

Custom series allows you to customize the rendering of graphical elements
in the series. This enables the extension of different charts.

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.graph.Graph
documentation:
<<< Graph >>>

The graph is used to represent the relational data.

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.sankey.Sankey
documentation:
<<< Sankey >>>

Sankey diagram is a special flow diagram, which is mainly used to
express how raw materials, energy and so on from the initial form through
the intermediate process of processing, transformation to the final form.

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.parallel.Parallel
documentation:
<<< Parallel >>>

Parallel coordinate systems are commonly used to visualize graphs of
high dimensional data.

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.line.Line
documentation:
<<< Line Chart >>>

Line chart is a graph that connects all data points
with single line to show the change trend of data.

functions.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.wordcloud.gen_color
documentation: generate random color for WordCloud

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.wordcloud.WordCloud
documentation:
<<< WordCloud >>>

Word cloud is to visually highlight the keywords that
appear frequently in the text.

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.basic_charts.polar.Polar
documentation:
<<< Polar >>>

Polar coordinates can be used for scatter and polyline graphs.

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.composite_charts.grid.Grid
documentation:
`Gird` Drawing grid in rectangular coordinate. In a single grid,
at most two X and Y axes each is allowed. Line chart, bar chart,
and scatter chart (bubble chart) can be drawn in grid.

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.composite_charts.page.Page
documentation: `Page` A container object to present multiple charts vertically in a single page

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.composite_charts.timeline.Timeline
documentation: `Timeline` provides functions like switching and playing between multiple charts.

modules.name: pyecharts.charts
documentation: basic Charts

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.base.Base
documentation:
`Base` is the root class for all graphical class, it provides
part of the initialization parameters and common methods

functions.name: pyecharts.render.snapshot.decode_base64
documentation:
Decode base64, padding being optional.

```
param data

Base64 data as an ASCII byte string

returns

The decoded byte string.
```

functions.name: pyecharts.commons.utils._expand
documentation: def _flat(obj):
if hasattr(obj, "js_dependencies"):
return list(obj.js_dependencies)
if isinstance(obj, (list, tuple, set)):
return obj
return (obj,)  # tuple

classes.name: pyecharts.charts.chart.Chart3D
documentation: `Chart3D`类是所有 3D 类图表的基类，继承自 `Chart` 类

classes.name: pyecharts.datasets.FuzzyDict

methods.name: pyecharts.datasets.FuzzyDict.__init__
documentation:
Construct a new FuzzyDict instance

items is an dictionary to copy items from (optional)
cutoff is the match ratio below which matches should not be considered
cutoff needs to be a float between 0 and 1 (where zero is no match
and 1 is a perfect match)

methods.name: pyecharts.datasets.FuzzyDict._search
documentation:
Returns the value whose key best matches lookfor

if stop_on_first is True then the method returns as soon
as it finds the first item
Provides a dictionary that performs fuzzy lookup

methods.name: pyecharts.render.engine.RenderEngine.render_chart_to_file
documentation:
Render a chart or page to local html files.

```
param chart

A Chart or Page object

param path

The destination file which the html code write to

param template_name

The name of template file.
```
